name: MINERALRITE Corp
business: MineralRite Corporation is a mineral and mine management and monetization company focused on the acquisition, evaluation, development, and monetization of mineral assets, with an emphasis on previously processed tailings and above-ground materials. The company aims to monetize these assets through production, joint ventures, project-level financing, or strategic transactions. It has not yet generated material operating revenues and remains in the development stage.

exposures.sentence: The Company s business model is focused on the acquisition, evaluation, development, and monetization of mineral assets, with an emphasis on previously processed tailings, above-ground materials, and other resource opportunities.
Our business is directly or indirectly influenced by the market prices of precious metals, including gold and silver.
We have disclosed an intention to engage in matched purchase-and-sale transactions involving physical precious metals.

catalysts.event: Renewal of Arizona State Land Department lease associated with mineral tailings project
catalysts.sentence: Operationally, during 2025 the Company concentrated on securing the renewal of its Arizona State Land Department (ASLD) lease associated with its mineral tailings project. That lease renewal was completed subsequent to year end.

catalysts.event: Preparation of Regulation S-K 1300 technical report covering tailings and related mineral assets
catalysts.sentence: In connection with this effort, the Company has engaged a Qualified Person (QP) to conduct a multi-phase technical evaluation and to prepare a Regulation S-K 1300 technical report covering the tailings and related mineral assets.

catalysts.event: Completion of Form 10 registration process and resolution of SEC staff comments
catalysts.sentence: The Company s principal remaining regulatory objective is the completion of the Form 10 registration process and the resolution of any remaining Staff comments.
